records.title: The Order of the Red Hand: Interview with Co-Founder Thor » The Hologram
records.selection_rationale: Represents an original interview recovered from the legacy thehologram.io host through an Internet Archive capture, with explicit HNN publication identity and named authorship.
risk_notes: The live legacy host is not the retrieval source; archive timestamp and digest must remain explicit.
The generic Star Atlas link recorded as a primary source does not independently establish the original interview recording.

records.title: Puri Token Rallies After Targeted Long Squeeze - Hologram News Network 🦉
records.selection_rationale: Represents an investigative classification on the successor hologramnews.com host recovered through an Internet Archive capture.
risk_notes: The surviving publication metadata does not identify an author.
The successor-site identity must remain distinct from the archived thehologram.io identity while retaining their HNN relationship.

records.title: Star Atlas SAGE Crafting: The Best Way to Get Crews Cheaply
records.selection_rationale: Represents a live Medium retrieval from The Hologram publication and deliberately exercises the corpus's only medium-confidence completeness boundary in this pilot.
risk_notes: Existing extraction completeness is REVIEW_REQUIRED.
The Hologram Medium publication must not be collapsed into the HNN website identity.
A live Medium page may contain edits made after original publication.

records.title: Star Atlas Rallies After “FTX Implosion”
records.selection_rationale: Represents a Medium author-profile URL that redirected to a different Medium publication surface, testing preservation of author, publication, and redirect identities.
risk_notes: The requested @krigsfoniks URL resolved to medium.com/blockchain-biz and both observations must be preserved.
No explicit primary source was identified from preserved outbound links.

records.title: Star Atlas: CORE Book One Recap *Spoilers*
records.selection_rationale: Represents an opaque Medium post-ID URL that resolved to a named The Hologram publication slug, testing stable post identity and canonical redirect capture.
risk_notes: The original /p/ URL is not sufficient by itself to establish publication membership.
The redirect target and Medium post ID must remain part of the provenance chain.

records.title: Leaked footage of the Fimbul Airbike
records.selection_rationale: Represents a short Aephia reference retrieved through the WordPress JSON API and deliberately exercises a medium-confidence completeness case.
risk_notes: Existing extraction completeness is REVIEW_REQUIRED because the body is short.
The live WordPress record may reflect later edits and no immutable raw HTML is currently preserved.
Aephia is an organization-level author value, not a confirmed named human byline.

records.title: SLY Assistant Tutorials: Standalone & Dashboards
records.selection_rationale: Represents a compact technical guide with embedded tutorial context and current-product terminology.
risk_notes: The page may have been edited after publication and should be captured as a dated state.
External tutorial media is referenced but is outside this text-only recovery pilot.
Aephia is an organization-level author value, not a confirmed named human byline.

records.title: Town Hall Report – August 27th, 2025
records.selection_rationale: Represents a long secondary report of an official event and tests preservation of event context, reported statements, and post-publication updates.
risk_notes: The report was updated after publication and must not be treated as a verbatim Town Hall transcript.
Reported announcements must remain distinct from releases, execution, or event outcomes.
Aephia is an organization-level author value, not a confirmed named human byline.

records.title: Star Atlas – Faction Fleet / SCORE Guide
records.selection_rationale: Represents an early product guide with a material later update, testing lifecycle chronology and historical state preservation.
risk_notes: The 2021 publication was materially updated in 2022, so publication-state claims require date qualification.
SCORE and Faction Fleet naming and lifecycle states must not be collapsed beyond the source wording.
Aephia is an organization-level author value, not a confirmed named human byline.

records.title: Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #125
records.selection_rationale: Represents an Aephia weekly aggregation containing multiple source lineages, announcements, roadmap statements, and reported events.
risk_notes: Aggregated claims require paragraph-level lineage and must not be treated as independent corroboration.
Announcements, planned dates, tests, and observed occurrences require separate states.
Aephia is an organization-level author value, not a confirmed named human byline.

records.title: How to play Star Atlas guide
records.selection_rationale: Represents a reference page whose inventory URL redirected to a canonical guide and whose content belongs to a known duplicate cluster.
risk_notes: The inventory URL redirected to https://intergalacticherald.com/star-atlas-guide/ and both URLs must be preserved.
Its content hash duplicates SRC-IH-A30A8FE220020005; neither evidence record should be silently deleted.
The guide aggregates broadly sourced material with limited named-source attribution.

records.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #53
records.selection_rationale: Represents a known short or incomplete Herald newsletter extraction and date anomaly, providing a negative-boundary recovery test.
risk_notes: Existing extraction completeness and publication dating require review.
A successful recapture must not silently replace the preserved prior extraction.
The recap is curated secondary material and requires source-lineage preservation.

records.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #83
records.selection_rationale: Represents a complete multi-source weekly recap suitable for validating article-body capture and claim-to-outbound-source alignment.
risk_notes: The recap contains multiple source relationships and must not be treated as original reporting.
Each significant claim requires alignment to the correct outbound source rather than the article as a whole.

records.title: Star Atlas Event Recap 43: Atlas Brew 178-Interview with Jacob, Co-Founder and CTO of Star Atlas
records.selection_rationale: Represents an AI-generated event recap containing an interview summary and transcript-derived material.
risk_notes: The original Atlas Brew URL is not preserved in the existing record.
The named Jacob identity and CTO role require source-native confirmation before canonical promotion.
AI-generated summary wording must remain distinct from the underlying interview evidence.

records.title: Star Atlas Event Recap 71: Star Atlas Lore Keepers 19
records.selection_rationale: Represents an AI-generated Lore Keepers recap with transcript-derived lore claims, testing community-summary lineage against the lore authority model.
risk_notes: The original Lore Keepers recording URL is not preserved in the existing record.
Lore claims require reconciliation with the canonical lore vocabulary and must remain attributed to the recap or underlying event.
AI-generated summary wording is not primary lore evidence.

records.title: What is Sage Labs Starbased?
records.selection_rationale: Represents a mutable Zendesk support article with a stable numeric article identifier and product-support terminology.
risk_notes: A live recapture documents current state and cannot reproduce the article's earlier state without an archived snapshot.
Redirects and update metadata must be preserved.
Existing encoding artifacts must not be silently corrected in preserved evidence.

records.title: Star Atlas Launches a New Era of Gaming with Record-shattering Token Sales | Star Atlas
records.selection_rationale: Represents an early official newsroom announcement for which a near-publication archival snapshot would materially improve historical fidelity.
risk_notes: The current live page may drift from its 2021 publication state.
Historical outbound links, including FTX-related links, may now be unavailable or contextually stale.
Announcement language must not be treated as independent verification of outcomes.

records.title: Star Atlas Build
records.selection_rationale: Represents dynamic official technical documentation whose generic title makes path and capture-time context essential to identity.
risk_notes: No reliable original publication date is present.
The documentation is mutable and a recapture establishes only capture-time state.
Current documentation must not be used as proof of historical feature availability.

records.title: Star Atlas DAO
records.selection_rationale: Represents a highly mutable governance root page combining current navigation, release statements, and future-facing material.
risk_notes: The page is undated and dynamic; a recapture is a capture-time state only.
Release statements and Coming Soon language must remain separate lifecycle states.
The root page must not substitute for proposal, vote, implementation, or execution evidence.

records.title: factory README
records.selection_rationale: Represents official GitHub documentation and tests immutable commit-pinned recovery rather than mutable default-branch capture.
risk_notes: The default-branch URL is mutable and the #readme fragment is not part of HTTP resource identity.
Recovery must pin the commit SHA, blob path, and checksum.
A current commit must not be claimed to reproduce the document's 2025 state.
